top_signals.title: Oil Climbs as Fresh Tanker Strike Highlights Risks Around Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Oil gained following attacks on vessels in the Strait of Hormuz, highlighting continued risks to traffic in the waterway.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Samsung Results Trigger Stock Rotation to Less Loved Sectors
top_signals.summary: Asian tech stocks slumped as investors used Samsung Electronics Co.’s results to lock in profits on a stellar year-to-date chip rally, rotating into unloved sectors with cheaper valuations less prone to earnings shocks.
